text:
In the event that a party fails to comply with directions and/or fails to attend any hearing without good reason the court may make final orders including care orders and placement orders at that hearing.

IT IS ORDERED THAT:

Next hearing

There shall be a case management hearing at the Family Court sitting at [court name] at [time] on [date] before [name of judge] allowing [number] hours. The parties and advocates shall attend 1 hour prior to the listed time for pre-hearing discussions.

The child[ren]’s solicitor shall arrange an advocates’ meeting not later than 2 working days before the next hearing which shall be attended by the advocates who will appear at the case management hearing.

Allocation

The proceedings are allocated for case management to [name of judge].

Parents’ response

[Names] shall by 4.00pm on [date] file at court and serve on the parties their Parent’s Response.

The number of alternative carers the parents are permitted to put forward are limited to a maximum of 3 per parent or 4 per child.

If the parents fail to respond [to the schedule of findings in support of the threshold criteria], the court may proceed to consider [at the next hearing] / [at the IRH] / [at the final hearing] whether the section 31(2) Children Act 1989 threshold criteria are established by reference to the written evidence filed by the local authority.

Children’s guardian’s analysis

A children’s guardian shall be appointed for the children.

The child[ren]’s guardian must by 11.00am on [date] file at court and serve on the parties a case analysis.

Disclosure

In the event that the local authority has not already made a police protocol request pre-proceedings, it must make an Annex 1 request for any police disclosure it seeks within 7 days.

The parties must by 4.00pm on [date] serve any requests for disclosure on any third party (including any agencies and any medical body).

Any party intending at the case management hearing to seek an order for disclosure from a third party shall give written notice of the application with a copy of this order to the third party by [date].

Any third party objecting to the disclosure sought is directed either to attend the case management hearing to explain the objection or make written representations.
